description_long: This is a stylish pair of sunglasses featuring a full-rim, rounded frame with a bold red and black tortoiseshell pattern. The lenses are tinted a deep red, providing both a striking visual effect and sun protection. The temples are straight with a slight curve at the ends for a secure fit, and the frame appears moderately thick, giving it a sturdy and fashionable look. The bridge is a classic saddle style, smoothly connecting the two lenses without any visible nose pads. A small, white 'Polaroid' brand logo is printed on the upper corner of the right lens and also on the temples. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A bold, round pair of sunglasses with red-tinted lenses and a red-black tortoiseshell patterned frame, featuring a visible Polaroid logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round lenses, full-rim frame, and the Polaroid logo on the right lens.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight temple with the tortoiseshell pattern and the Polaroid logo near the hinge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the temples and the overall frame structure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the temple's length, curve, and the Polaroid logo near the hinge.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is fully rimmed and rounded, with moderate thickness and a smooth, continuous contour. The temples are straight with a gentle curve at the ends, and the overall style is bold and modern, lacking any ornate embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are tinted a solid, deep red color with uniform transparency and no visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a classic saddle style, smoothly integrated into the frame, with no separate nose pads or additional features.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are straight and moderately thick, featuring the same red and black tortoiseshell pattern as the frame, with a printed Polaroid logo near the hinge.
attribute_brand_logo: A white 'Polaroid' logo is visible, printed on the upper corner of the right lens and on both temples near the hinges.
